impact: Advances the PP&D process-model milestone by covering the FCC wireless workflow with deterministic fixtures for stages, facts, documents, file rules, payment/inspection/finalization gates, and citation-backed action gates without live crawling or private DevHub artifacts.
summary: Adds a fixture-only FCC wireless application permit-process skeleton and focused validation using existing public/source-inventory evidence references only.
target_task: Task checkbox-111: Add a fixture-only permit-process skeleton for an FCC wireless application workflow using existing public fixture/source-inventory evidence only, with stages, required facts, required documents, file rules, fee/payment gates, inspection/finalization gates, and citation-backed action gates.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
